summary: Implemented Phase 3 live spectator analysis delivery. `RoomTask` now computes `game.observer_analysis()` once per live tick only when spectator connections exist, then sends the existing `ObserverAnalysis`/`replayAnalysis` payload only to room players with `spectator: true`. Updated protocol docs to state the live cadence and privacy boundary, and marked `plans/live-analysis/phase-3.md` done.
verification: cd server && cargo test live_spectator: passed
gameplay_impact: Live spectators now have server-authored observer analysis data available at normal tick cadence. Active live players, including claimed branch-live seats, do not receive the analysis payload.
next_executor_notes: Phase 4 can rely on the same `replayAnalysis` wire tag and observer analysis payload shape for replay viewers and live spectators. The active-player exclusion is enforced in `broadcast_live_observer_analysis_to_spectators()` by checking `RoomPlayer.spectator`; branch-live claimed seats are flipped to `spectator: false` before live ticks.
manual_test_notes: Start a live match with two active players and one spectator. Confirm the spectator receives normal union-fog snapshots plus `replayAnalysis` messages, while active players receive snapshots only and no observer analysis messages.
